# Project Documentation

## Overview
This is a standard Markdown file generated for your project. You can use this to document your code, features, or project roadmap.

## System Components
- **Equalizer**: 6-band graphical control with professional presets.
- **Theme Engine**: Dynamic color extraction and custom user palettes.
- **Audio Logic**: AVFoundation-based engine with clipping protection.

## Next Steps
1. Integration of the components into the main app lifecycle.
2. User testing for audio performance.
3. UI refinement for accessibility.
